title: luscious turkish eggplant imam bayildi
description: a rich and flavorful eggplant dish from turkey, featuring melted manchego cheese and a tangy fermented tomato sauce.
instructions: cut the eggplants in half lengthwise and place them in a baking dish.
brush the eggplants with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
roast the eggplants in the oven for 30 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned.
while the eggplants are roasting, heat a tablespoon of olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
add the chopped onion to the pan and cook until it is softened and lightly browned.
add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for an additional minute.
stir in the fermented tomato sauce and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce is heated through.
remove the eggplants from the oven and top each half with a spoonful of the tomato sauce and a sprinkle of shredded manchego cheese.
return the eggplants to the oven and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
serve the eggplants hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
